overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Log File integration uses Vector collector to provide high-performance, low-resource file log collection. Supports automatic log format recognition, multi-line log merging, file rotation detection, and more.

items.title: Auto Format Detection
items.description: Intelligently identify JSON, Syslog, Apache/Nginx and other common formats

items.title: Rotation Detection
items.description: Auto-detect log rotation, seamlessly switch to new files without losing logs

items.title: Multi-line Merge
items.description: Support Java stack traces, Python Tracebacks multi-line log merging

items.title: High Performance
items.description: Rust-powered Vector engine with minimal CPU and memory usage

bestPractices.title: Supported Log Formats
items: JSON - Structured JSON logs with automatic field extraction
Apache Common/Combined - Apache HTTP server log format
Nginx - Nginx access and error logs
Plain Text - Unstructured text logs stored as message field
